description: dev-stacks v3: session init, prompt routing, compact snapshot, completion gate, subagent gate

hooks.prompt:
Review this conversation transcript carefully.

Your job: decide if Claude should stop or continue working.

Return {"decision": "block", "reason": "<Thai or English explanation>"} ONLY if ALL conditions are true:
1. Code was written (Write/Edit/MultiEdit tools were used)
2. No verification was done at all (no test, no review, no build)
3. There is an unresolved error that was NOT shown to the user

In ALL other cases return nothing (empty stdout) or exit 0.

IMPORTANT: When in doubt — do NOT block. Let the user decide.
IMPORTANT: If user explicitly said stop or asked a question — do NOT block.
IMPORTANT: Research, explanation, planning tasks — do NOT block.

If blocking: output JSON only, no other text.

Check if this subagent produced its required output.

Return {"decision": "block", "reason": "Missing output header"} ONLY if:
1. The subagent performed code work (used Write/Edit/MultiEdit)
2. AND none of these headers appear in output:
   - THINKER ANALYSIS
   - BUILDER IMPLEMENTATION  
   - REVIEWER VERIFICATION
   - RESEARCH COMPLETE
   - DESIGN COMPLETE

In ALL other cases: return nothing (empty stdout) or exit 0.

When in doubt — do NOT block.

If blocking: output JSON only, no other text.
